commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can filter the Telegram reaction decision set and add the missing regression without changing the product direction.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete approval-boundary concern because Telegram can accept an undocumented allow-always reaction path.; Review finding: [P1] Filter Telegram reaction approvals to the documented decisions — extensions/telegram/src/approval-ha... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Telegram approval-reaction handling, persistence-backed reaction target binding, focused Telegram tests, and Telegram docs for resolving pending approvals from message reactions.

PR surface: Source +250, Tests +330, Docs +19. Total +599 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR passes all pending approval actions into the Telegram reaction target, while the shared SDK resolves infinity to `allow-always` when that decision is present. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can filter the Telegram reaction decision set and add the missing regression without changing the product direction.
